ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithm_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run of the algorithm */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the algorithm used */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run ended */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware configuration used for the run */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the run was executed */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_runs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the metric belongs to */,
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic (e.g., 0, 1, 2) */,
  "best_fitness" INTEGER /* Best fitness achieved in the run */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Number of generations completed */,
  "genetic_diversity" REAL /* Genetic diversity of the population */,
  "individuals" INTEGER /* Total number of individuals in the population */,
  "selected_genotypes" INTEGER /* Number of selected genotypes */,
  "selected_individuals" INTEGER /* Number of selected individuals */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the algorithm */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the run (in milliseconds) */,
  "function_calls" INTEGER /* Number of function calls made during the run */,
  "iteration_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for each iteration (generation) */,
  "convergence_rate" REAL /* Rate of convergence to the optimal solution */,
  "resource_usage" TEXT /* Resource usage during the run */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate during the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_metrics_statistic_id FOREIGN KEY ("statistic_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Specific team the user is part of */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used by the algorithm (stored as a JSON object) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the algorithm */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the algorithm */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the algorithm is deprecated */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Computational complexity of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version (e.g., bug fixes, new features) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the version */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_settings" TEXT /* Configuration settings used for the run (stored as a JSON object) */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the run was executed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_configurations_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the log belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was generated */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the log */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information or context for the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the result belongs to */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Final results of the algorithm run (stored as a JSON object) */,
  "convergence_data" TEXT /* Data related to the convergence of the algorithm */,
  "resource_usage_data" TEXT /* Detailed resource usage data */,
  "error_data" TEXT /* Any error data encountered during the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES algorithm_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, run, edit) */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the permission is valid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
